category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Precomp as further compressing already compressed files.
source_facts.description describes Precomp as a command-line precompressor to achieve better compression.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is precomp; official project pages use the title Precomp.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Precomp project page.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository; its README documents usage and behavior.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official repository describes handling compressed streams and files.
source_facts.description identifies command-line precompression for better compression.
